meta.title: US Carrier Strike Groups are adding new drone-hunting missiles
meta.description:
America’s aircraft carriers will now be defended by advanced new turbojet-powered drone interceptor missiles that can loiter in the airspace around the carrier strike group to rapidly engage incoming drone swarms. 

So, let's talk about Anduril's Roadrunner-M and Raytheon's Coyote interceptors.
